description: Represents an application graph link connection entry for an application graph node generated from the different logs collected by the app agents.

allow.description: The number of allowed connections to this node.
allow.title: allow

connections.description: The connection links from this node to other nodes in the application graph.
connections.title: connections

deny.description: The number of denied connections to this node.
deny.title: deny

encrypted.description: The number of encrypted connections to this node.
encrypted.title: encrypted

insecureEncryption.description: The number of connections to this node with insecure encryption (e.g., TLS 1.0 or 1.1).
insecureEncryption.title: insecureEncryption

unencrypted.description: The number of unencrypted connections to this node.
unencrypted.title: unencrypted

title: AppGraphLinkConnection
